fields.description: Small uppercase text shown above the main headline (e.g. "Since 1962").
fields.label: Eyebrow / Subtitle

fields.description: Main headline shown on the home page hero.
fields.label: Headline

fields.description: Short paragraph shown below the headline.
fields.label: Description

fields.description: Text on the primary button. Leave blank to hide the button.
fields.label: Button label

fields.description: Path or full URL the button leads to, e.g. /category/Sarees
fields.label: Button link

fields.description: Shown to the right of the hero text on desktop. Recommended 3:4 or 4:5 ratio, public file.
fields.label: Image

fields.description: Description for screen readers / SEO. Defaults to the headline if blank.
fields.label: Image alt text
